title: YTsaurus table attributes
description: JSON Schema for attributes of YTsaurus table-like Cypress nodes. It covers user-settable and readable attributes for static tables, dynamic tables, replicated dynamic tables, and chaos replicated tables. Unknown keys are allowed because Cypress nodes may also carry arbitrary user attributes.

type.description: Cypress node type; table nodes report table.

id.description: Object id of the table node.

path.description: Canonical Cypress path of the table.

account.description: Account charged for resources consumed by the table.

acl.description: Access control list entries applied to the table.

inherit_acl.description: Whether ACL entries are inherited from ancestors.

owner.description: User that owns the table object.

external.description: Whether the table is stored in an external cell.

external_cell_tag.description: Cell tag for an externally stored table.

opaque.description: Whether Cypress path traversal treats this node as an opaque boundary.

annotation.description: Free-form human-readable annotation attached to the table.

annotation_path.description: Path from which the effective annotation is inherited.

creation_time.description: Time when the table object was created.

modification_time.description: Time when the table object or its attributes were last modified.

access_time.description: Time when the table was last accessed.

expiration_time.description: Absolute time at which the table expires and may be removed.

schema.description: Declared YTsaurus table schema. Use either a plain array of column descriptors or an attributed YSON-as-JSON object with $value and $attributes.

schema_mode.description: Effective schema mode: weak schemas permit schemaless writes, strong schemas enforce declared columns.

schema_id.description: Internal id of the registered table schema.

schema_duplicate_count.description: Number of objects currently sharing the same registered schema.

key_columns.description: Names of key columns derived from sorted schema columns.

sorted.description: Whether the table schema is sorted.

sorted_by.description: Sort key column names for sorted tables.

dynamic.description: Whether the table is a dynamic table.

chunk_format.description: Low-level chunk format used for newly written chunks.

compression_codec.description: Compression codec for newly written chunks.

erasure_codec.description: Erasure codec for newly written chunks.

replication_factor.description: Replication factor for chunks on regular media.

primary_medium.description: Primary storage medium name for chunks.

primary_medium_id.description: Internal id of the primary storage medium.

media.description: Per-medium storage settings keyed by medium name.

hunk_erasure_codec.description: Erasure codec used for hunk chunks.

hunk_storage_id.description: Object id of the hunk storage associated with the table.

row_count.description: Number of rows visible for static tables.

chunk_row_count.description: Total number of rows stored in chunks.

unmerged_row_count.description: Approximate unmerged row count for sorted dynamic tables.

compressed_data_size.description: Compressed size of table chunks in bytes.

uncompressed_data_size.description: Uncompressed size of table chunks in bytes.

chunk_count.description: Number of chunks owned by the table.

last_commit_timestamp.description: Latest committed timestamp for sorted dynamic tables.

tablet_cell_bundle.description: Tablet cell bundle used by the dynamic table.

tablet_count.description: Desired number of tablets at creation time or after resharding.

pivot_keys.description: Tablet pivot keys; the first pivot key is normally an empty key.

tablet_state.description: Aggregate tablet state reported by the master.

tablet_error_count.description: Number of tablets currently reporting errors.

commit_ordering.description: Commit ordering mode for ordered dynamic tables.

in_memory_mode.description: Whether and how tablet stores are kept in memory.

enable_dynamic_store_read.description: Whether reads may observe rows from dynamic stores.

enable_tablet_balancer.description: Whether tablet balancing is enabled for this table.

min_tablet_size.description: Lower tablet size bound used by tablet balancing.

max_tablet_size.description: Upper tablet size bound used by tablet balancing.

desired_tablet_size.description: Target tablet size used by tablet balancing.

desired_tablet_count.description: Target tablet count used by tablet balancing.

mount_config.description: Table-specific mount configuration patch applied on tablet mount/remount.

profiling_mode.description: How dynamic table profiling sensors are grouped.

profiling_tag.description: Custom profiling tag used when profiling_mode is tag.

enable_detailed_profiling.description: Whether detailed per-tablet profiling is enabled.

serialization_type.description: Transaction serialization granularity for dynamic tables.

enable_consistent_chunk_replica_placemen.description: Whether consistent chunk replica placement is enabled.

custom_runtime_data.description: Arbitrary runtime data propagated to tablet nodes.

replicated.description: Whether the dynamic table is replicated.

replicas.description: Replica descriptors keyed by replica id.

upstream_replica_id.description: Replica id from which this table receives replicated writes.

replication_collocation_id.description: Id of the replication collocation containing this table.

replication_card_id.description: Chaos replication card id associated with the table.

chaos_cell_bundle.description: Chaos cell bundle used for chaos replicated table metadata.

treat_as_queue.description: Whether the table should be treated as a queue by queue agents.

treat_as_queue_consumer.description: Whether the sorted dynamic table should be tracked as a queue consumer.

vital_queue_consumer.description: Whether this queue consumer is vital for queue health.

treat_as_queue_producer.description: Whether the sorted dynamic table should be tracked as a queue producer.

queue_agent_stage.description: Queue agent stage responsible for this table.

objectId.description: YTsaurus object id encoded as a string.

instant.description: UTC timestamp in ISO 8601 date-time format.

timestamp.description: YT timestamp; uint64 values may be represented as strings in JSON.

row.description: YTsaurus row or key represented as an ordered list of values.

data_parts_only.description: Whether only data parts are placed on this medium.

tableSchema.description: Table schema, optionally encoded with list attributes such as strict and unique_keys.

tableSchemaValue.description: Plain ordered list of table column descriptors.

strict.description: Whether the table schema is strict and rejects undeclared columns.

unique_keys.description: Whether key column values must be unique for sorted tables.

tableSchemaAttributes.description: Attributes attached to a table schema list in YSON-as-JSON form.

$attributes.description: YSON attributes attached to the schema list.

attributedTableSchema.description: YSON-as-JSON representation of an attributed table schema list.

required.description: Whether column values must be non-null.

lock.description: Lock group name for dynamic table writes.

aggregate.description: Aggregate function for aggregate dynamic columns.

stable_name.description: Stable column name used across renames.

max_inline_hunk_size.description: Maximum value size stored inline before using hunks.

cell_id.description: Tablet cell id currently hosting the tablet.

pivot_key.description: First key belonging to this tablet.

trimmed_row_count.description: Number of trimmed rows for ordered tablets.

flushed_row_count.description: Number of rows flushed to chunks.

enabled.description: Whether replication to this replica is enabled.

preserve_timestamps.description: Whether replicated writes preserve original timestamps.

enable_replicated_table_tracker.description: Whether replicated table tracker manages this replica.
